Patented software · Since 2009 · 20+ countries

Next generation |

A customer touch point has two sides. Finally, both of them work. For fifteen years, ID24 has pioneered customer-facing technology - for staff working stores, front desks and bank offices. We re-invented anything from the paper form, customer display hardware to fraud detection using AI.

Hardware

Built for real-world counters.

Robust customer displays with NFC, cameras and multiple screen sizes — designed for interaction between customer, staff and existing systems.

DI2 10”

Patents & protection

Innovative solutions with protection

Protected core

Simultaneous input

Protection around assisted interactions where cashier and customer operate in parallel, without collisions or OS-level workarounds.

Protected UX

Helper-button keyboard

Design-protected field assistance that reduces friction and accelerates collection tasks such as email capture.

Why it matters

Protection that becomes positioning

For modern B2B buyers, patents are not just legal assets. They signal product originality, strengthen category ownership, and create confidence that the workflow is difficult to copy.

Proof · Research · Protection

Credibility that supports the sale.

Research, articles, patents, awards, accelerator programs and advisory board credibility.

Research / IKEA / Articles

89%

Retailers see theft as a key self-checkout challenge.

Use articles, studies and customer stories as proof that ID24 understands the operational problems behind modern checkout and customer interaction.

Patents & protection

Highlight patented simultaneous input and protected interaction design as a competitive advantage.

Global experience

Show 15+ years of experience, 20+ countries and international recognition as brand credibility.

Pilot without system change

Make the conversion path clear: remote installation, software testing, support and typical go-live in 8–12 weeks.

Fraud detection AI

Detect anomalies before they become losses.

AI-based transaction analysis helps identify suspicious behavior, reduce errors and strengthen internal control.
